theme.brandTagline: Hire daily-basis labour faster across industries

header.announcement: Daily worker hiring for factories, workshops, contractors and growing businesses

footer.description: ScaleVyapar Rozgar is a modern labour hiring platform for textile, factory, warehouse, logistics, delivery, hospitality and multi-industry workforce needs.

hero.title: Hire Daily-Basis Labour Faster Across Industries
hero.subtitle: ScaleVyapar Rozgar connects businesses with verified and skilled workers instantly. Post your requirement and hire the right workforce for your business anytime, anywhere.

trustStrip.title: Built for faster workforce coordination
items: Daily labour hiring for growing businesses
Fast hiring for companies and contractors

features.title: What companies get
features.subtitle: A premium labour hiring experience designed for daily operations, fast workforce demand and category-specific business hiring.

cards.title: Industry-specific hiring
cards.description: Hire labour across textile, factory, warehouse, logistics, manufacturing, hospitality and delivery operations.

cards.title: Business-ready plan flow
cards.description: Keep company onboarding, plan selection and labour posting connected to the admin approval workflow.

cards.title: Visible workforce search
cards.description: Browse active workers, explore labour categories and shortlist candidates before posting or expanding requirements.

steps.title: Register company
steps.description: Submit your company identity, contact person and core hiring information.

steps.title: Post labour requirement
steps.description: Add your first workforce demand with category, city, count and requirement details.

steps.title: Get worker responses
steps.description: Browse workforce availability and connect with relevant labour candidates faster.

steps.title: Manage through dashboard
steps.description: Track plans, requirements and labour workflow inside the connected ScaleVyapar ecosystem.

pricing.title: Company pricing
pricing.subtitle: Keep plans clear, business-friendly and easy to understand for labour hiring operations.
pricing.footnote: Displayed plans below are connected to live active company plans from the labour database.

items.quote: This platform is built for practical labour hiring, not slow traditional recruitment. That makes it useful for production and operations teams.
items.name: Operations Team

items.quote: Fast category-based requirements and a clear company flow make daily workforce hiring much more efficient for SMEs and contractors.
items.name: Hiring Desk

items.question: Can I post requirements for more than one labour category?
items.answer: Yes. A company can select multiple categories and create multiple labour requirements from the same flow.

items.question: Can pricing and plan validity be changed later?
items.answer: Yes. Company plans are controlled from the labour admin panel and can be updated there.

items.question: Will my requirement go live immediately?
items.answer: The current flow creates a pending company with a draft job post so your admin team can review and activate it.

finalCta.title: Ready to hire faster with ScaleVyapar Rozgar?
finalCta.subtitle: Launch your company profile, publish a labour requirement, and move into a premium dashboard experience backed by the existing ScaleVyapar ecosystem.

intake.title: Register Company & Post Requirement
intake.description: Start with a polished employer intake flow and send your first labour requirement into the existing ScaleVyapar admin review system.

pricingPage.title: Choose the right company plan for your hiring volume and urgency.
pricingPage.subtitle: Clear pricing, short validity windows and category-specific options tailored for business labour hiring workflows.
pricingPage.customPlanDescription: Use a personalised plan if you hire across many categories or cities and want additional admin support.

signinPage.infoTitle: What you can do after sign in
signinPage.infoDescription: View active plans, manage requirements, follow job status and connect with the admin team.

searchPage.title: Browse visible labour by category, city and availability.

searchPage.emptyTitle: No workers match these filters yet
